'''''Kraglin''''' is the eighth episode of the [[Legends/Season Two|second season]] of ''[[Legends]]''.

''Kraglin'' was released prior to ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' to recap [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]'s story up to the beginning of the new film. It features footage from ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'', ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]'', ''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'', and ''[[The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special]]''.

==Synopsis==
''[[Legends|LEGENDS]]'' recounts the journey that transformed [[Kraglin Obfonteri|a]] [[Ravagers|Ravager]] into a bona fide [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardian of the Galaxy]].
